zh.Clackmannanshire, , , Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾
zh.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse是Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky和Unknown的兒子，於1325年出生在英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾。他與Marjory Striveling heiress結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1382年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse是Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky和Unknown的儿子，于1325年出生在英国苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾。他与Marjory Striveling heiress结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1382年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾享年57岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰雷福福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse was born in 1325, in Clackmannanshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky and Unknown. He married Marjory Striveling heiress. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1382, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse est né en 1325, à Clackmannanshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky et Unknown. Il a épousé Marjory Striveling heiress. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1382, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse wurde 1325 in Clackmannanshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky und Unknown geboren. Er hat Marjory Striveling heiress geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1382 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse è nato il nel 1325 nel Clackmannanshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky e Unknown. Lui sposato Marjory Striveling heiress. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1382, nel Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerseは1325年にイギリススコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアでSir Walter Menteith II of RuskyとUnknownの息子として生まれた。Marjory Striveling heiressと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1382年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで57歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse(은)는 1325년 영국 스코틀랜드 클랙먼아실르에서 Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Marjory Striveling heiress(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1382년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse nasceu em 1325, em Clackmannanshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky e Unknown. Ele casou-se com Marjory Striveling heiress. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1382, em Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse родился в 1325 г. в местности клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky и Unknown. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory Striveling heiress. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1382 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: John Menteith, First Lord of Kerse nació en 1325, en Clackmannanshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir Walter Menteith II of Rusky y Unknown. Se casó con Marjory Striveling heiress. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1382, en Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
